screen.zhifontgo.title: Font Selection
screen.zhifontgo.apply_hint: Choosing a font or tuning values now only updates the preview. Click Confirm Apply to switch globally and build cache.
screen.zhifontgo.preview_plain: Base: Chinese English 12345, rounded corners and strokes
screen.zhifontgo.preview_shadow: Shadow: menu text glow, tooltip edge, colorful labels
screen.zhifontgo.quality_hint: Settings and glyph cache are stored in resourcepacks/font. Default oversample is max and default size is 8.
screen.zhifontgo.status.preview_font: Preview updated for font: %1$s. Click Confirm Apply to commit it.
screen.zhifontgo.status.preview_vanilla: Preview switched to vanilla. Click Confirm Apply to commit it.
screen.zhifontgo.status.preview_tuning: Preview tuning updated. Click Confirm Apply to commit it.
screen.zhifontgo.status.tuning_saved: Tuning updated. It will apply after you select a font.
screen.zhifontgo.status.tuning_reapplied: Tuning updated and reapplied to the current font.
screen.zhifontgo.loading.title: Preloading Font
screen.zhifontgo.loading.hint: Please wait. The screen will return automatically when loading finishes.
screen.zhifontgo.loading.startup_hint: Please wait, the client is initializing~
screen.zhifontgo.loading.mode.startup: Preloading the saved font during startup
screen.zhifontgo.loading.mode.apply: Applying the new font and warming common glyphs
screen.zhifontgo.loading.mode.reapply: Rebuilding the current font and warming common glyphs
disconnect.zhifontgo.disallowed_server.l: This client can only connect to %1$s and its subdomains.
